backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Sagrai Village Digital Platform, defining data types and stable storage for users, crops, orders, notices, gallery, and contact inquiries, along with profile management and access-controlled CRUD operations.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend page and component file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Sagrai Village Digital Platform SPA, mounting the React app at the `#root` div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, an AdminGuard that redirects unauthenticated users and shows an access-denied screen for non-admins, and wraps everything in AuthProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a styled access-denied message with a ShieldX icon and a 'Return to Home' button for authenticated users who lack admin privileges.
frontend/src/components/AddCropModal.tsx: Modal dialog form for farmers to submit a new crop listing with name, quantity, price, description, phone, and image upload, pending admin approval.
Modal dialog for admins to add a new gallery photo by entering an image URL and optional caption, with a live preview.
frontend/src/components/AddNoticeModal.t: Modal dialog for admins to post a new village notice with a title and content field.
frontend/src/components/AuthProvider.tsx: Provides an authentication context using Internet Identity, exposing user profile, role flags (admin/farmer/buyer), login/logout, and profile refetch via React context.
frontend/src/components/EditCropModal.ts: A modal dialog form that allows a farmer to edit an existing crop listing's details and image, submitting changes via the useEditCrop mutation and requiring re-approval afterward.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site-wide footer with village info, contact details, quick navigation links, and village metadata for the Sagrai Digital Platform.
frontend/src/components/ImageLightbox.ts: A full-screen image lightbox dialog component supporting navigation between multiple images with previous/next buttons and dot indicators.
frontend/src/components/ImageUploadField: A file input component for uploading crop images that shows a preview, validates file type and size, converts the file to an ExternalBlob, and reports upload progress.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, displaying the user's name when authenticated and a loading spinner during login.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: A responsive sticky navigation bar with desktop and mobile menus, active-link highlighting, a conditional admin Control Panel link, and an integrated login button.
frontend/src/components/OrderRequestModa: A modal dialog that lets buyers submit an order request for a specific crop, collecting buyer name, phone, and optional message, with a success confirmation screen after submission.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionMod: A two-step onboarding modal that prompts new users to select a role (Farmer or Buyer) and fill in their name and phone number to create their profile.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Provides React Query hooks for admin operations including fetching all users, crops, orders, and contact inquiries, as well as approving, rejecting, and deleting crops.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactInquiries.t: Exports a single mutation hook for submitting a contact inquiry (name, phone, email, message) to the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCrops.ts: Provides React Query hooks for crop operations: fetching approved crops, fetching the current user's crops, and adding, editing, or deleting crops with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useGallery.ts: Provides React Query hooks for gallery management: fetching all gallery items, adding a new item with image URL and caption, and deleting an item by ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotices.ts: Provides React Query hooks for notice board operations: fetching all notices, adding a new notice with title/content/author, and deleting a notice by ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useOrders.ts: Provides React Query hooks for order operations: placing orders, fetching the caller's orders, fetching orders for the caller's crops, and updating order status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the authenticated caller's user profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Poppins and Playfair Display fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for a green/orange village theme with light and dark mode variants.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static informational page describing Sagrai village's history, population, location, and community values using cards and icons.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard with tabbed views for managing pending/all crop listings, users, orders, notices, and gallery items, including approve/reject/delete actions.
frontend/src/pages/AgriculturePage.tsx: Static page showcasing Sagrai's agricultural crops and farming practices, with a hero image and a link to the crop marketplace.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact form page that submits inquiries (name, phone, optional email, message) to the backend and shows a confirmation state on success.
frontend/src/pages/CropsPage.tsx: Displays a searchable, filterable crop marketplace where farmers can list, edit, and delete crops, and buyers can place order requests. Includes skeleton loading states, crop cards with image/details, and modals for adding/editing crops and submitting orders.
frontend/src/pages/CulturePage.tsx: Static informational page showcasing Sagrai village's culture, including community values, festivals, traditions, and the Ma Sheetala Mata Temple, rendered with cards and a hero banner.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Photo gallery page that fetches and displays village images in a responsive grid with lightbox support; admins can add or delete photos.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for the Sagrai village platform featuring a hero banner, village highlights strip, introduction section, crop list, and community values, with links to the marketplace and about page.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page using Internet Identity authentication that redirects users after login and shows appropriate notices for admin-required routes or access-denied scenarios for non-admin users.
frontend/src/pages/NoticesPage.tsx: React page that displays a village notice board, allowing admins to post and delete notices, with loading skeletons and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both hash-based and regular routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the project.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the Sagrai Village project, with one pending feature request to deploy the frontend and backend canisters to the ICP mainnet.
